summary_en: 150,000 shares (1.18% of S/O), ¥400M limit, at ¥2,104/share (May 25 close), ToSTNeT-3 block trade May 26 morning, execution during designated trading window only.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Shares and Purchase of Treasury Shares via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Meiji Electric Industries announced on May 25, 2026, that its board of directors has authorized the acquisition of treasury shares via off-hours trading. The company will execute a single ToSTNeT-3 block trade on May 26, 2026, during the morning session at ¥2,104 per share (the May 25 closing price). The purchase is capped at 150,000 shares (1.18% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) and ¥400M in total expenditure. The order is valid only for the designated trading window on May 26 morning and may be partially or entirely unfulfilled depending on market conditions. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 14,102 treasury shares against an issued share count of 12,751,718. The stated rationale is to implement flexible capital policy in response to changes in the operating environment. Results will be disclosed after the close of the May 26 trading session.
